Uses of Class
neqsim.process.util.exergy.ExergyAnalysisReport

Packages that use ExergyAnalysisReport
Package
Description
neqsim.process.processmodel
 

  • Uses of ExergyAnalysisReport in neqsim.process.processmodel

    Methods in neqsim.process.processmodel that return ExergyAnalysisReport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ExergyAnalysisReport
    ProcessModel.getExergyAnalysis()
    Build a structured ExergyAnalysisReport covering every unit operation in every process area, with each entry tagged by its area name.
    ExergyAnalysisReport
    ProcessSystem.getExergyAnalysis()
    Build a structured ExergyAnalysisReport with one entry per unit operation.
    ExergyAnalysisReport
    ProcessSystem.getExergyAnalysis(double surroundingTemperature)
    Build a structured ExergyAnalysisReport with one entry per unit operation using an explicit dead-state temperature.
    Methods in neqsim.process.processmodel with parameters of type ExergyAnalysisReport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ProcessSystem.populateExergyAnalysis(ExergyAnalysisReport report, double surroundingTemperature, String areaName)
    Populate an existing report with entries for this process system.
